## 📰 Hacker News Highlights / 黑客新闻精选

### How to Run SimCity 3000 in 4K on Modern Windows Systems

* **Problem**: SimCity 3000, considered the best in the series, has compatibility issues on modern hardware including no widescreen support, low resolution limits (800x600/1024x768), scrolling lag and acceleration, startup slowdown, missing music, and graphical glitches
* **Solution Overview**: A six-step patching process enables the game to run at 4K resolution (3840x2160) on Windows 10 with modern hardware (Ryzen 5 3600, Radeon RX 7600, 48GB RAM)
* **Key Fixes**: GOG's patched EXE enables widescreen and acts as No-CD patch; mouse acceleration tweaked via SC3U.ini (ScrollMarginFactor = 0.005787); D3D Wrapper fixes resolution issues and DirectX 11+ compatibility
* **Additional Patches**: 4GB patch allows more RAM usage to reduce tile loading delays; disabled auto-updater eliminates startup slowdown from dead update servers; music restoration patch adds missing tracks from original release
* **Installation**: Requires original CD or legitimate copy, then applying patches sequentially with configuration file edits for fullscreen mode and proper scaling
* **Result**: Fully playable SimCity 3000 at native 4K resolution with all original music, smooth scrolling, and no graphical artifacts on modern Windows 10 systems

### 如何在现代 Windows 系统上以 4K 分辨率运行《模拟城市 3000》

* **问题描述**：被认为是系列最佳作品的《模拟城市 3000》在现代硬件上存在兼容性问题，包括不支持宽屏、分辨率限制低（800x600/1024x768）、滚动卡顿和加速、启动缓慢、音乐缺失以及图形故障
* **解决方案概述**：通过六步补丁流程，使游戏能够在 Windows 10 系统上以 4K 分辨率（3840x2160）运行，支持现代硬件（Ryzen 5 3600、Radeon RX 7600、48GB 内存）
* **核心修复**：GOG 修补的 EXE 文件启用宽屏支持并充当免 CD 补丁；通过 SC3U.ini 调整鼠标加速度（ScrollMarginFactor = 0.005787）；D3D 包装器修复分辨率问题和 DirectX 11+ 兼容性
* **附加补丁**：4GB 补丁允许使用更多内存以减少地块加载延迟；禁用自动更新程序消除因失效更新服务器导致的启动缓慢；音乐恢复补丁添加原版发行中缺失的曲目
* **安装步骤**：需要原版 CD 或正版游戏，然后依次应用补丁并编辑配置文件以启用全屏模式和正确缩放
* **最终效果**：在现代 Windows 10 系统上以原生 4K 分辨率完美运行《模拟城市 3000》，包含所有原版音乐、流畅滚动且无图形瑕疵

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://www.thran.uk/writ/hdid/2025/12/simcity-3k-in-4k.html)**

### DuckDuckGo's AI-Free Search Sees Major Traffic Surge After Google Doubles Down on AI

* **DuckDuckGo's AI-free search page saw 27.7% peak growth** in visits during May 20-25, following Google CEO's claim that users "love" AI Mode
* **Mobile app installs spiked significantly**: 18.1% average growth in the US, with iOS installs peaking at 69.9% week-over-week
* **Google Search has become an "obstacle course"** with chunky AI overviews that recycle human-written content and discourage clicking away
* **DuckDuckGo CEO criticizes Google's approach**: "Google is force-feeding AI with no way to opt out. Their results are getting worse, not better"
* **Market context**: DuckDuckGo holds ~2% of US search market vs Google's 85%, but the trend shows growing user dissatisfaction with forced AI integration
* **DuckDuckGo's strategy**: Offers AI tools (like duck.ai for private LLM chats) but prioritizes user choice and privacy—no search history collection or AI training on user data
* **Key takeaway**: Users want control over AI features, not mandatory integration. DuckDuckGo's AI overviews remain popular alongside options to filter AI-generated content

### DuckDuckGo 无 AI 搜索流量激增，谷歌强推 AI 模式后访问量增长近 28%

* **DuckDuckGo 无 AI 搜索页面访问量激增**：5月20-25日期间峰值增长达27.7%，此前谷歌CEO声称用户"喜爱"AI模式
* **移动应用安装量大幅上涨**：美国地区平均增长18.1%，iOS端安装量周环比峰值达69.9%
* **谷歌搜索已成"障碍赛道"**：臃肿的AI概览回收人类作者内容，阻止用户点击离开谷歌
* **DuckDuckGo CEO 批评谷歌做法**："谷歌强制灌输AI且无法选择退出，搜索结果越来越差而非更好"
* **市场格局**：DuckDuckGo占美国搜索市场约2%，谷歌占85%，但趋势显示用户对强制AI整合日益不满
* **DuckDuckGo 策略**：提供AI工具(如duck.ai私密LLM对话)，但优先考虑用户选择权和隐私——不收集搜索历史，不用于AI训练
* **核心要点**：用户需要对AI功能的控制权，而非强制集成。DuckDuckGo的AI概览受欢迎，同时提供过滤AI生成内容的选项

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://www.pcgamer.com/hardware/duckduckgos-ai-free-search-saw-nearly-28-percent-more-visits-in-the-week-following-googles-insistence-that-people-love-ai-mode/)**

### Last.fm Becomes Independent Company

* Last.fm has transitioned to an independent company with new ownership, but the service remains unchanged
* All user accounts, scrobble history, data, and privacy settings remain exactly as they were
* The existing team continues to operate the platform with no changes to Pro subscriptions or billing
* The service is not shutting down or being acquired—it's operating independently to focus on music listening insights and community features
* API functionality continues normally for developers, and there are no current changes to pricing
* Users can support the platform by subscribing to Last.fm Pro

### Last.fm 现已独立运营

* Last.fm 已转型为独立公司,所有权发生变更,但服务本身保持不变
* 所有用户账户、播放记录、数据和隐私设置完全保持原样
* 现有团队继续运营平台,Pro 订阅和账单不受影响
* 该服务不会关闭也未被收购——而是独立运营,专注于音乐收听洞察和社区功能
* API 功能对开发者继续正常运作,目前定价没有变化
* 用户可以通过订阅 Last.fm Pro 来支持平台发展

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://support.last.fm/t/last-fm-is-now-independent/118591)**

* **Why it's notable**: Gained 1,737 stars today for offering a complete automated video production pipeline that's accessible to non-technical users through one-click deployment packages, while providing copyright-free HD materials and supporting both cloud and local processing options

### Understand-Anything - Interactive Knowledge Graph for Any Codebase

* **What it does**: Transforms codebases, knowledge bases, or documentation into interactive, explorable knowledge graphs. Analyzes project structure using multi-agent pipelines to map every file, function, class, and dependency into a visual network you can search, navigate, and query.

* **Key features**: 
  - Auto-generated guided tours ordered by dependency
  - Fuzzy and semantic search across the entire codebase
  - Diff impact analysis to visualize change ripple effects
  - Business logic domain mapping with horizontal flow graphs
  - Persona-adaptive UI that adjusts detail level for different user roles
  - Multi-language support (English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian)
  - Cross-platform compatibility with 10+ AI coding assistants

* **Why it's notable**: Gained 4,466 stars today by solving a universal developer pain point—onboarding to unfamiliar codebases. Instead of overwhelming complexity visualizations, it focuses on teaching through interactive exploration. The "graphs that teach > graphs that impress" philosophy resonates with developers drowning in legacy code. Works seamlessly across Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, and other popular AI coding tools, making it immediately accessible to a massive user base.

---

  - 业务逻辑领域映射,以水平流程图展示业务流程
  - 角色自适应界面,根据用户角色(初级开发者/产品经理/高级用户)调整详细程度

### stop-slop - AI Writing Pattern Removal Skill

* **What it does**: A skill file that teaches LLMs like Claude to identify and remove telltale AI writing patterns from prose, making text sound more human and authentic
* **Key features**: Comprehensive detection of banned phrases (throat-clearing openers, business jargon, adverbs), structural clichés (binary contrasts, passive voice), and sentence-level issues; includes scoring rubric (1-10 across 5 dimensions: directness, rhythm, trust, authenticity, density); works with Claude Code, Claude Projects, custom instructions, or API calls
* **Why it's notable**: Addresses a growing problem as AI-generated content becomes ubiquitous—the predictable patterns and rhythms that make text feel robotic; provides actionable rules and before/after examples to help writers and developers produce more natural, engaging prose; gained 664 stars today as content quality becomes increasingly important

### stop-slop - AI 文本特征清除工具

* **功能介绍**: 一个技能文件,用于训练 Claude 等大语言模型识别并移除 AI 写作中的典型模式,使文本更自然、更具人性化
* **主要特点**: 全面检测禁用短语(冗余开头、商业术语、副词)、结构化陈词滥调(二元对比、被动语态)和句子级问题;包含评分标准(5 个维度各 1-10 分:直接性、节奏感、信任度、真实性、密度);支持 Claude Code、Claude Projects、自定义指令或 API 调用
* **为何值得关注**: 针对 AI 生成内容泛滥带来的核心问题——那些让文本显得机械化的可预测模式和节奏;提供可操作的规则和前后对比示例,帮助写作者和开发者产出更自然、更吸引人的文章;今日获得 664 星标,反映出内容质量日益受到重视

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/hardikpandya/stop-slop)**


## 🚀 Fast-Moving Repos / 快速崛起项目

### get-shit-done-redux - AI-Powered Development Workflow System for Context Management

* **What it does**: A meta-prompting and spec-driven development system that prevents "context rot" (quality degradation as AI context windows fill up) by orchestrating AI coding assistants through structured workflows with fresh subagent contexts
* **Key features**: Six-command loop (initialize → discuss → plan → execute → verify → ship), parallel execution with atomic commits, cross-runtime support (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, etc.), structured artifact persistence (PROJECT.md, ROADMAP.md, STATE.md), automated verification and debugging, profile-based installation
* **Why it's notable**: Solves a critical problem in AI-assisted development by keeping main context clean while delegating heavy work to fresh subagent contexts; maintained by open-gsd team after upstream ownership concerns; trusted by engineers at major tech companies; 1,291 stars with active security auditing and transparent governance

---

### get-shit-done-redux - AI 开发工作流系统，专注上下文管理

* **功能介绍**: 一个元提示和规范驱动的开发系统,通过结构化工作流和全新子代理上下文来编排 AI 编码助手,防止"上下文腐化"(随着 AI 上下文窗口填满导致的质量下降)
* **主要特点**: 六步命令循环(初始化 → 讨论 → 规划 → 执行 → 验证 → 发布)、带原子提交的并行执行、跨运行时支持(Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf、Copilot 等)、结构化工件持久化(PROJECT.md、ROADMAP.md、STATE.md)、自动验证和调试、基于配置文件的安装
* **为何值得关注**: 通过保持主上下文清洁并将繁重工作委托给全新子代理上下文,解决了 AI 辅助开发中的关键问题;在上游所有权问题后由 open-gsd 团队维护;受到大型科技公司工程师信赖;拥有 1,291 星标,具有主动安全审计和透明治理

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/open-gsd/get-shit-done-redux)**

### Kimi Code CLI - AI Coding Agent That Runs in Your Terminal

* **What it does**: An AI-powered coding agent that operates directly in your terminal, capable of reading/editing code, executing shell commands, searching files, fetching web pages, and autonomously deciding next steps based on feedback. Works with Moonshot AI's Kimi models and other compatible providers.

* **Key features**: 
  - Single-binary distribution with blazing-fast startup (no Node.js required)
  - Purpose-built terminal UI for long agent sessions
  - Video input support for visual context
  - AI-native MCP (Model Context Protocol) configuration
  - Subagents for parallel focused work (coder, explore, plan)
  - Lifecycle hooks for automation and safety gates

* **Why it's notable**: Represents a new generation of autonomous coding agents with a polished developer experience. The single-binary approach eliminates installation friction, while features like video input and conversational MCP configuration show thoughtful innovation in how developers interact with AI assistants. Strong early traction (855 stars) suggests demand for terminal-native AI coding tools.

---

### Kimi Code CLI - 运行在终端中的 AI 编码代理

* **功能介绍**: 一个在终端中运行的 AI 编码代理,能够读写代码、执行 shell 命令、搜索文件、抓取网页,并根据反馈自主决定下一步操作。支持 Moonshot AI 的 Kimi 模型及其他兼容提供商。

* **主要特点**:
  - 单一二进制文件分发,启动速度极快(无需 Node.js)
  - 专为长时间代理会话设计的终端界面
  - 支持视频输入提供可视化上下文
  - AI 原生的 MCP(模型上下文协议)配置
  - 子代理支持并行专注工作(编码、探索、规划)
  - 生命周期钩子用于自动化和安全控制

* **为何值得关注**: 代表了新一代自主编码代理,提供精致的开发者体验。单一二进制的安装方式消除了配置障碍,视频输入和对话式 MCP 配置等功能展现了在开发者与 AI 助手交互方式上的创新思考。早期获得的关注度(855 星)表明市场对终端原生 AI 编码工具的需求强劲。

### YouTube Introduces Automatic AI Content Detection for Creators

* **Automatic AI labeling launches May 2026**: YouTube will use internal signals to automatically detect and label realistic AI-generated content when creators don't manually disclose it
* **Creators retain control**: If content is incorrectly flagged as AI-generated, creators can update the disclosure status in YouTube Studio
* **Permanent disclosure exceptions**: Labels cannot be removed for content created with YouTube's AI tools (Veo, Dream Screen) or content containing C2PA metadata indicating full generative AI creation
* **Balancing automation and transparency**: The system aims to make AI disclosure more seamless and reliable while keeping creators responsible for accurate labeling

### YouTube 为创作者推出自动 AI 内容检测功能

* **2026 年 5 月推出自动 AI 标签**：当创作者未手动披露时，YouTube 将使用内部信号自动检测并标记逼真的 AI 生成内容
* **创作者保留控制权**：如果内容被错误标记为 AI 生成，创作者可以在 YouTube 工作室中更新披露状态
* **永久披露例外情况**：使用 YouTube AI 工具（Veo、Dream Screen）创建的内容或包含表明完全由生成式 AI 创建的 C2PA 元数据的内容，其标签无法移除
* **平衡自动化与透明度**：该系统旨在使 AI 披露更加无缝可靠，同时让创作者对准确标记负责

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://blog.youtube/news-and-events/improving-ai-labels-viewers-creators/)**

### I think Anthropic and OpenAI have found product-market fit

* **Enterprise pricing shift**: Both Anthropic and OpenAI switched their enterprise plans from flat-rate subscriptions to API-based pricing (around $20/seat/month plus usage costs) in late 2025/early 2026, meaning enterprise customers now pay the same token costs as API users
* **Coding agents drive usage**: Tools like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex burn significantly more tokens than chat interfaces—the author's personal usage would cost ~$2,180/month at API rates versus the $200 they actually pay for consumer plans
* **Product-market fit evidence**: Anthropic is rumored to reach profitability soon; companies report unexpectedly high AI bills; both labs are hiring heavily for enterprise sales (27-33% of open positions)
* **Revenue potential**: Enterprise customers paying $200+/month per heavy user (potentially $1,000+/month in API costs) provides a much faster path to covering infrastructure costs than $10-20/month consumer subscriptions
* **Massive inference spending**: Anthropic's deal with SpaceX reveals they're spending $1.25 billion/month just for additional compute capacity from one vendor, indicating the scale of inference operations
* **Overblown failure stories**: Reports of companies like Uber "maxing out AI budgets" or Microsoft canceling licenses are actually signs of product-market fit—customers are using these tools so much they're hitting budget limits set before coding agents became truly useful in November 2025

### 我认为 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 已经找到了产品市场契合点

* **企业定价转变**：Anthropic 和 OpenAI 在 2025 年底/2026 年初将企业计划从固定订阅费改为基于 API 的定价模式(约每席位每月 20 美元加使用费),这意味着企业客户现在支付与 API 用户相同的 token 成本
* **编码代理驱动使用量**：Claude Code 和 OpenAI Codex 等工具消耗的 token 远超聊天界面——作者个人使用按 API 费率计算约需 2,180 美元/月,而实际只需支付 200 美元的消费者计划费用
* **产品市场契合的证据**：Anthropic 据传即将实现盈利;企业报告 AI 账单意外高昂;两家实验室都在大量招聘企业销售人员(占空缺职位的 27-33%)
* **收入潜力**：企业客户为重度用户支付每月 200 美元以上(API 成本可能达 1,000 美元以上/月),比每月 10-20 美元的消费者订阅更快覆盖基础设施成本
* **大规模推理支出**：Anthropic 与 SpaceX 的交易显示,他们仅从一家供应商购买额外算力就每月花费 12.5 亿美元,表明推理操作的规模之大
* **被夸大的失败故事**：Uber"用尽 AI 预算"或微软取消许可证的报道实际上是产品市场契合的迹象——客户使用这些工具如此频繁,以至于超出了 2025 年 11 月编码代理真正变得有用之前设定的预算限制

### Rust (and Slint) on a Jailbroken Kindle

* **Project motivation**: Jailbroke a 7th gen Kindle Paperwhite to use it as a nightstand clock, then explored running Rust applications on the device
* **Cross-compilation setup**: Used `cargo-zigbuild` with Zig compiler to target ARMv7 with musl libc, avoiding the need to compile directly on the low-powered Kindle
* **Shell access**: Installed USBNetwork tool for SSH access via USB/WiFi to deploy and test applications
* **GUI implementation**: Integrated Slint UI framework with custom Kindle backend, using software renderer to output to the e-ink framebuffer (`/dev/fb0`)
* **Display refresh**: Used `ioctl()` system calls to trigger e-ink screen updates for dirty regions
* **Touch input**: Read touch events directly from `/dev/input/event1` using Linux multi-touch protocol type B, translating raw kernel events into Slint pointer events
* **Result**: Successfully created a working counter app with touch button, published `slint-backend-kindle` crate on crates.io
* **Next steps**: Plans to build a Home Assistant dashboard for the Kindle

### 在越狱 Kindle 上运行 Rust(和 Slint)

* **项目动机**:将第 7 代 Kindle Paperwhite 越狱用作床头时钟,然后探索在设备上运行 Rust 应用程序
* **交叉编译设置**:使用 `cargo-zigbuild` 和 Zig 编译器针对 ARMv7 和 musl libc 进行编译,避免在低性能 Kindle 上直接编译
* **Shell 访问**:安装 USBNetwork 工具,通过 USB/WiFi 实现 SSH 访问以部署和测试应用程序
* **GUI 实现**:集成 Slint UI 框架和自定义 Kindle 后端,使用软件渲染器输出到电子墨水帧缓冲区(`/dev/fb0`)
* **显示刷新**:使用 `ioctl()` 系统调用触发电子墨水屏幕更新脏区域
* **触摸输入**:直接从 `/dev/input/event1` 读取触摸事件,使用 Linux 多点触控协议 B 型,将原始内核事件转换为 Slint 指针事件
* **成果**:成功创建了带触摸按钮的计数器应用,在 crates.io 上发布了 `slint-backend-kindle` 包
* **下一步计划**:为 Kindle 构建 Home Assistant 仪表板

### ECC - The Agent Harness Performance Optimization System

* **What it does**: A comprehensive operator system that enhances AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, etc.) with production-ready skills, memory optimization, security scanning, and continuous learning capabilities. Built from 10+ months of real-world product development.

* **Key features**: 
  - 61 specialized agents, 246 skills, and 76 legacy command shims across 12+ programming languages
  - Cross-harness compatibility (works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini, Zed, GitHub Copilot)
  - Memory persistence hooks, token optimization, and verification loops for production reliability
  - AgentShield security scanning with attack vector protection and sandboxing
  - New v2.0.0-rc.1 includes Tkinter dashboard GUI, operator workflows, and Rust control-plane prototype (ECC 2.0 alpha)
  - Selective install architecture with manifest-driven component installation
  - Session state management with SQLite store and structured recording

* **Why it's notable**: 
  - Anthropic Hackathon Winner with 182K+ stars and 170+ contributors
  - Not just configs—a complete production system evolved from intensive daily use
  - Bridges the gap between basic AI coding assistants and enterprise-grade agentic development
  - MIT-licensed OSS with optional Pro tier ($19/seat/mo) for private repos via GitHub App
  - Comprehensive guides covering everything from setup to security, token optimization, and parallelization
  - Active development with weekly cross-harness updates and expanding language ecosystem support

### codex-shim - Local API Shim for Codex Desktop with BYOK Model Support

* **What it does**: A local Python server that acts as a translation layer between Codex Desktop and any bring-your-own-key (BYOK) AI models, plus optional ChatGPT GPT-5.5 passthrough. It exposes an OpenAI-compatible endpoint on localhost that Codex can use without modification.

* **Key features**: 
  - Routes requests to multiple upstream providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Gemini, OpenRouter, local proxies) while preserving Codex's native UX including function calls, tool outputs, and streaming
  - Adds custom models to Codex's model picker without rebuilding the application
  - ChatGPT subscription passthrough for accessing GPT-5.5 through Codex Desktop
  - Cross-platform support (Windows, macOS, Linux, WSL, Git Bash)
  - Prompt-catching proxy architecture for deduplication and token optimization

* **Why it's notable**: Solves a major limitation in Codex Desktop by enabling users to use any AI model provider while keeping Codex's full agent capabilities intact. The maintainer reports multi-fold reductions in billed tokens and faster response times. With 655 stars, it's gaining traction among developers who want flexibility in model choice without sacrificing Codex's sophisticated coding-agent features.

---

### Can We Have the Day Off?

* AI is promised to revolutionize white-collar productivity by 10x, making work faster and easier across all aspects of life
* If AI truly delivers 10x productivity gains, workers should theoretically complete a full week's work by midday Monday
* The author proposes taking Fridays off as "AI workers' day" - letting AI agents work while humans rest
* This arrangement would benefit everyone: workers get three-day weekends, executives get more golf time, and AI handles Friday workloads
* The proposal highlights a disconnect between productivity promises and actual work-life balance improvements
* Personal note: With California childcare costing $6,000/month for three children, why not work four days instead of five if AI makes us so productive?

### 我们能休息一天吗?

* 人工智能承诺将白领生产力提高10倍,让工作在生活各方面都变得更快更轻松
* 如果AI真能实现10倍生产力提升,理论上工作者应该能在周一中午前完成过去一整周的工作量
* 作者提议将周五定为休息日,称为"AI工作者日"——让AI代理工作,人类休息
* 这种安排对所有人都有利:员工获得三天周末,高管有更多时间打高尔夫,AI在周五处理工作
* 该提议凸显了生产力承诺与实际工作生活平衡改善之间的脱节
* 个人观点:加州三个孩子的托儿费用每月6000美元,如果AI让我们如此高效,为什么不工作四天而非五天?

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://mlsu.io/posts/day-off/)**

### What Apple and Google Are Doing to Your Push Notifications

* **Push notifications now pass through active intermediaries**: Apple and Google control the only two delivery pipes, and on-device AI models now summarize, reorder, and rewrite notifications before they reach users
* **Platform intervention has escalated over 15 years**: From simple on/off toggles in 2009 to notification channels (Android 8, 2017), interruption taxonomies (iOS 15, 2021), and runtime permissions (Android 13, 2022) that dropped opt-in rates from 85% to 67%
* **Push is following email's path**: Email went through similar intermediation with spam filters, tabbed inboxes, and AI summaries—push is now at the same maturity level but with less sender visibility and control
* **Senders are losing instrumentation**: Unlike email's deliverability dashboards, push offers almost no visibility into whether notifications were summarized, deprioritized, or hidden by Focus modes
* **On-device AI is the new gatekeeper**: Apple Intelligence and Android's models make display decisions locally using opaque, unappealable logic—platforms defend user attention as their own asset, not just user advocacy
* **Structural disadvantages vs. email**: Push has no open protocols, no portable subscription lists, no authentication standards like DKIM, and notifications disappear from the tray rather than persisting like email in an inbox

### 苹果和谷歌如何处理你的推送通知

* **推送通知现在经过主动中介处理**：苹果和谷歌控制着仅有的两条传输管道，设备端AI模型在通知到达用户之前会对其进行摘要、重新排序和改写
* **平台干预在15年间不断升级**：从2009年的简单开关切换，到通知频道(Android 8, 2017)、中断分类(iOS 15, 2021)，再到运行时权限(Android 13, 2022)，导致选择加入率从85%降至67%
* **推送正在重复电子邮件的路径**：电子邮件经历了类似的中介化过程，包括垃圾邮件过滤、分类收件箱和AI摘要——推送现在达到了相同的成熟度，但发送者的可见性和控制力更低
* **发送者正在失去监测工具**：与电子邮件的送达率仪表板不同，推送几乎无法让发送者看到通知是否被摘要、降级或被专注模式隐藏
* **设备端AI成为新守门人**：Apple Intelligence和Android的模型使用不透明、无法申诉的逻辑在本地做出显示决策——平台将用户注意力视为自己的资产来保护，而非纯粹的用户权益倡导
* **相比电子邮件的结构性劣势**：推送没有开放协议、没有可移植的订阅列表、没有类似DKIM的认证标准，且通知会从通知栏消失而非像电子邮件那样持久保存在收件箱中

### Pianke (片刻) - AI-Powered Local Photo Culling Tool for Photographers

* **What it does**: A privacy-first photo selection tool that uses AI to automatically group similar shots from a session and lets you quickly pick the best ones through an intuitive A/B comparison interface. Supports RAW formats with embedded preview extraction and RAW+JPG pairing.

* **Key features**: Three operating modes (Fast/Expert/Tycoon) balancing speed vs AI capability; local-first processing with DINOv2 vision models and face recognition; automatic quality filtering for blurry/overexposed/closed-eye shots; keyboard-driven tournament-style selection (←/→ keys); multi-level undo and auto-save progress; batch EXIF watermarking with 11 styles.

* **Why it's notable**: Solves a real pain point for photographers drowning in hundreds of similar shots from burst mode or continuous shooting. The hybrid approach—AI handles tedious initial filtering and grouping, humans make final aesthetic decisions—is pragmatic. Pure local processing (except Tycoon mode) protects privacy while the tournament UI makes culling surprisingly fast. RAW workflow support and Chinese localization show attention to professional photographer needs.

---

### Pianke (片刻) - 摄影师专用的 AI 本地选片工具

* **功能介绍**: 一款隐私优先的照片筛选工具,利用 AI 自动将拍摄中的相似照片归组,然后通过直观的左右对比界面快速挑选最佳照片。支持 RAW 格式的内嵌预览提取和 RAW+JPG 配对处理。

* **主要特点**: 三种工作模式(极速/专家/土豪)平衡速度与 AI 能力;基于 DINOv2 视觉模型和人脸识别的本地化处理;自动过滤模糊/过曝/闭眼等废片;键盘驱动的擂台式选片(←/→ 键);多级撤销和自动保存进度;批量添加 EXIF 水印,提供 11 种样式。

* **为何值得关注**: 解决了摄影师在连拍或连续拍摄后面对数百张相似照片的痛点。混合方案——AI 处理繁琐的初筛和分组,人类做最终美学决策——非常务实。纯本地处理(土豪模式除外)保护隐私,擂台式 UI 让选片效率大幅提升。对 RAW 工作流的支持和中文本地化体现了对专业摄影师需求的关注。

### A Eureka Machine That Thinks Like Nature and Explores What AI Cannot

* Researchers from IISc and international partners have developed a neuromorphic computer that combines quantum-tunneling physics with brain-inspired architecture to solve complex combinatorial optimization problems
* The system uses a neuromorphic autoencoder with Fowler-Nordheim annealer, offering asymptotic convergence guarantees for problems like protein folding, logistics networks, and cryptography
* Unlike traditional AI models that struggle with combinatorial problems, this machine searches for solutions by navigating energy landscapes similar to natural processes
* The collaborative work emerged from global neuromorphic engineering workshops (Telluride, BNEW at IISc, CapoCaccia) and was published in Nature Communications
* Led by Professor Shantanu Chakrabartty (Washington University) and includes Professor Chetan Singh Thakur (IISc), with partners from Heidelberg, Johns Hopkins, and UC Santa Cruz
* Represents a fundamental shift from Moore's Law scaling to architectures that compute differently, addressing problems where "faster chips" are no longer the solution

### 类似自然思维的尤里卡机器：探索人工智能无法触及的领域

* 印度科学研究所(IISc)及国际合作伙伴开发出一种神经形态计算机，结合量子隧穿物理和类脑架构，用于解决复杂的组合优化问题
* 该系统采用神经形态自编码器配合Fowler-Nordheim退火器，为蛋白质折叠、物流网络和密码学等问题提供渐近收敛保证
* 与在组合问题上表现不佳的传统AI模型不同，这台机器通过类似自然过程的能量景观导航来搜索解决方案
* 该合作研究源于全球神经形态工程研讨会(美国Telluride、IISc的BNEW、欧洲CapoCaccia)，成果发表于《自然·通讯》
* 由Shantanu Chakrabartty教授(华盛顿大学圣路易斯分校)领导，包括Chetan Singh Thakur教授(IISc)，合作方来自海德堡大学、约翰斯·霍普金斯大学和加州大学圣克鲁兹分校
* 代表了从摩尔定律扩展向不同计算架构的根本转变，解决"更快芯片"已不再是解决方案的问题

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://iisc.ac.in/a-eureka-machine-that-thinks-like-nature-and-explores-what-ai-cannot/)**

### Building a Personal Relationship Map from 1.2M Messages Across 20 Years

* **Motivation**: Inspired by WaitButWhy's "Life in Weeks" visualization, the author wanted to measure life quality through relationships and conversations rather than just biometric data or major life events
* **Data sources**: Collected 20 years of chat history from ICQ, IRC, VK, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, and Telegram using GDPR data exports
* **Technical challenges**: Parsing inconsistent formats (Instagram double-encodes Cyrillic, Telegram changes message IDs between exports, Facebook's E2E encryption creates duplicate folders)
* **Noise filtering**: 41% of messages were conversational filler; developed a frequency-based denylist by sampling and manually reviewing top tokens across languages
* **Vocabulary analysis**: 52,000 unique lemmas total, with novelty rate declining from 45% to 6% over time—most vocabulary locked in by early 20s
* **Name resolution problem**: Same person appears across platforms with different usernames and diminutives (e.g., Alexander → Al, Alex, Sasha); context-dependent disambiguation needed
* **Classification approach**: Used LLMs (~15-20B tokens processed) to classify life events, resolve entity mentions, and extract structured data with <1% false-positive rate
* **Architecture**: LLM outputs structured JSON manifests; deterministic Python scripts inject bullets into Obsidian vault with provenance markers linking back to source messages
* **Prompt engineering**: Prompt grew from 8KB to 80KB through iterative refinement based on mistakes (e.g., added first-person possession test after model misclassified friend's purchase as user's)
* **Quality control**: Validation scripts catch orphan links and duplicates; random sampling verifies outputs against source to prevent confabulation
* **Sentiment analysis**: Standard tools fail to capture asymmetric relationship dynamics (one person enthusiastic, other giving one-word replies)

### PilotDeck - Task-Oriented AI Agent Productivity Platform

**What it does:**
PilotDeck is an open-source agent operating system built around the "WorkSpace" concept, designed for long-running, multi-project productivity work. It isolates files, memory, and skills per project, enabling AI agents to work autonomously across multiple tasks without context pollution.

**Key features:**
* **WorkSpace-Level Isolation** - Each project gets its own file system, memory store, and skill set, preventing cross-project interference
* **White-box Memory** - Fully traceable memory system where you can view, edit, and rollback AI memory entries when mistakes occur
* **Smart Routing** - Automatically matches task difficulty to appropriate models (flagship vs. lightweight), achieving ~70% cost savings
* **Always-on Execution** - Agents continue working in the background, discovering tasks, monitoring progress, and delivering results as local files
* **Native MCP Support** - Built-in Model Context Protocol integration with consistent behavior across Web/CLI/IM interfaces

**Why it's notable:**
PilotDeck addresses critical gaps in existing AI agent platforms by making memory transparent and editable, enabling cost-effective background execution, and providing true multi-project isolation. Developed by Tsinghua University THUNLP, ModelBest, OpenBMB, and AI9Stars, it demonstrates impressive real-world results: 70% cost reduction on social media workflows and 1/6 the cost while matching frontier model performance on complex tasks. With 893 stars and recent open-source release (May 2026), it represents a significant evolution in agent operating systems for productivity work.

---

### PilotDeck - 面向任务的 AI Agent 生产力平台

**功能介绍:**
PilotDeck 是一个围绕"工作空间"概念构建的开源智能体操作系统,专为长期运行的多项目生产力工作而设计。它为每个项目隔离文件、记忆和技能,使 AI 智能体能够在多个任务中自主工作而不会产生上下文污染。

**主要特点:**
* **工作空间级隔离** - 每个项目拥有独立的文件系统、记忆存储和技能集,防止跨项目干扰
* **白盒记忆** - 完全可追溯的记忆系统,可以查看、编辑和回滚 AI 记忆条目
* **智能路由** - 自动将任务难度匹配到合适的模型(旗舰版 vs 轻量版),实现约 70% 的成本节省
* **全天候执行** - 智能体在后台持续工作,发现任务、监控进度并将结果交付为本地文件
* **原生 MCP 支持** - 内置模型上下文协议集成,在 Web/CLI/IM 界面保持一致行为

**为何值得关注:**
PilotDeck 通过使记忆透明可编辑、实现经济高效的后台执行以及提供真正的多项目隔离,填补了现有 AI 智能体平台的关键空白。由清华大学 THUNLP、ModelBest、OpenBMB 和 AI9Stars 联合开发,展示了令人印象深刻的实际效果:社交媒体工作流成本降低 70%,在复杂任务上以 1/6 的成本达到前沿模型性能。拥有 893 星标并于 2026 年 5 月开源,代表了生产力工作智能体操作系统的重大进化。

### Building a Personal Relationship Map from 1.2M Messages Across 20 Years

* **Motivation**: Inspired by WaitButWhy's "Life in Weeks" visualization, the author wanted to measure life quality through relationships rather than just biometric data or major events
* **Data sources**: Exported 20 years of chat history from ICQ, IRC, VK, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, and Telegram using GDPR data access rights
* **Technical challenges**: Parsing inconsistent formats (Instagram double-encodes Cyrillic, Telegram changes message IDs between exports, Facebook's E2E encryption creates duplicate folders)
* **Noise filtering**: 41% of messages were conversational filler; developed a frequency-based denylist by sampling and manually reviewing top 80 short tokens across languages
* **Vocabulary analysis**: 52,000 unique lemmas total, with novelty rate declining from 45% to 6% over time—most vocabulary locked in by early 20s
* **Entity resolution problem**: Same person appears across platforms with different usernames and diminutives (e.g., Alexander → Al, Alex, Sasha); traditional NER models insufficient
* **LLM-based solution**: Used LLMs (~15-20B tokens, <1% false positive rate) to classify events and resolve entity ambiguity, outputting structured JSON manifests rather than writing directly to vault
* **Architecture**: Deterministic Python scripts handle parsing/filtering/deduplication; SQLite tracks provenance; each output includes citation markers linking back to source messages
* **Prompt engineering**: Prompt grew from 8KB to 80KB through iterative error correction (e.g., adding first-person possession tests to prevent false event classification)
* **Quality control**: Validation scripts catch orphan links and duplicates; random sampling verifies outputs against source to catch confabulation
* **Directional sentiment**: Standard sentiment analysis fails for asymmetric conversations; needed to track emotional tone per participant, not per message

---

### 从 20 年 120 万条聊天记录构建个人关系图谱

* **动机**：受 WaitButWhy 的"人生周历"可视化启发,作者希望通过关系而非生物数据或重大事件来衡量生活质量
* **数据来源**：利用 GDPR 数据访问权限,导出了 ICQ、IRC、VK、Twitter、Facebook、Instagram 和 Telegram 等平台 20 年的聊天记录
* **技术挑战**：解析不一致的格式(Instagram 对西里尔字母双重编码,Telegram 在不同导出间更改消息 ID,Facebook 的端到端加密产生重复文件夹)
* **噪音过滤**：41% 的消息是对话填充词;通过采样和人工审查跨语言的前 80 个高频短词开发了拒绝列表
* **词汇分析**：总计 52,000 个独特词根,新词率从 45% 下降到 6%——大部分词汇在 20 岁出头时已固定
* **实体解析问题**：同一人在不同平台使用不同用户名和昵称(如 Alexander → Al、Alex、Sasha);传统 NER 模型不足以应对
* **基于 LLM 的解决方案**：使用 LLM(约 150-200 亿 token,误报率 <1%)对事件分类和实体消歧,输出结构化 JSON 清单而非直接写入知识库
* **架构设计**：确定性 Python 脚本处理解析/过滤/去重;SQLite 跟踪溯源;每个输出包含引用标记链接回源消息
* **提示词工程**：提示词从 8KB 增长到 80KB,通过迭代纠错(如添加第一人称所有格测试以防止错误事件分类)
* **质量控制**：验证脚本捕获孤立链接和重复项;随机抽样对照源数据验证输出以捕获幻觉
* **定向情感分析**：标准情感分析无法处理不对称对话;需要跟踪每个参与者的情感基调而非每条消息

### AMD Pulls a Bait-and-Switch on Linux Users with Vivado Licensing Changes

* **AMD restricts Linux support in Vivado FPGA design suite** — Starting with the 2026.1 release, the free "Basic" tier is Windows-only; Linux support now requires the paid "Core" tier at $1,200-$1,800/year
* **Classic bait-and-switch pattern** — AMD follows Redis's 2024 playbook: offer free access, build user base, then monetize once users are locked in
* **Linux users abandoned** — Students, hobbyists, and academic researchers who relied on native Linux workflows are left without affordable options
* **Weak justification from AMD** — Forum moderator claims 70% of users are on Windows, but fails to explain why that justifies paywalling Linux support for the remaining 30%
* **Community backlash growing** — Users are calling out AMD on support forums and Hacker News, with no official company statement yet addressing the controversy
* **Long-term consequences ignored** — Many affected users (students, researchers) will eventually hold procurement and engineering decision-making roles

### AMD 对 Linux 用户玩"诱饵调包"，Vivado 授权条款大变

* **AMD 限制 Vivado FPGA 设计套件的 Linux 支持** — 从 2026.1 版本开始，免费的"Basic"层级仅支持 Windows；Linux 支持需要付费的"Core"层级，年费 1,200-1,800 美元
* **经典的"诱饵调包"套路** — AMD 重演 Redis 2024 年的剧本：先免费提供服务吸引用户，等用户深度依赖后再收费变现
* **Linux 用户被抛弃** — 依赖原生 Linux 工作流的学生、硬件爱好者和学术研究人员失去了经济实惠的选择
* **AMD 的苍白辩解** — 论坛版主声称 70% 用户使用 Windows，但无法解释为何这能成为对剩余 30% 用户设置付费墙的理由
* **社区强烈反弹** — 用户在支持论坛和 Hacker News 上声讨 AMD，但公司至今未发布正式声明回应争议
* **忽视长期后果** — 许多受影响用户(学生、研究人员)未来将担任采购和工程决策职位

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://itsfoss.com/news/amd-vivado-bait-and-switch-on-linux-users/)**

### Rapira: A TypeScript Interpreter for the Soviet Educational Programming Language

* **РАПИРА** was a Soviet educational programming language designed in the early 1980s by G. A. Zvenigorodsky for the Agat microcomputer as part of the Shkolnitsa school computing system
* The project provides a modern TypeScript/Bun interpreter with a browser playground, CLI tool, and faithful implementation of the 1985 Agat dialect
* Features include Russian-only keywords, case-insensitive identifiers, three compound types (tuples, sets, records), and a "Чертёжник" (Draftsman) turtle graphics system
* The interpreter core includes lexer, parser, and tree-walking evaluator; CLI supports running programs and REPL mode; web playground uses CodeMirror 6 with light/dark themes
* Can be run without installation via `npx rapira FILE.rap` or installed globally with npm; includes comprehensive test suite and example programs
* Documentation includes implementation spec, canonical 1985 language spec reformatted to Markdown, and developer onboarding notes
* MIT licensed project by Alexander Demin, available at <https://begoon.github.io/rapira>

### Rapira:苏联教育编程语言的 TypeScript 解释器

* **РАПИРА** 是 1980 年代初由 G. A. Zvenigorodsky 为 Agat 微型计算机设计的苏联教育编程语言,是 Shkolnitsa 学校计算系统的一部分
* 该项目提供了现代 TypeScript/Bun 解释器,包含浏览器游乐场、CLI 工具,并忠实实现了 1985 年 Agat 方言
* 特性包括纯俄语关键字、不区分大小写的标识符、三种复合类型(元组、集合、记录)以及"Чертёжник"(绘图员)海龟图形系统
* 解释器核心包含词法分析器、解析器和树遍历求值器;CLI 支持运行程序和 REPL 模式;网页游乐场使用 CodeMirror 6 并支持明暗主题
* 可通过 `npx rapira FILE.rap` 无需安装直接运行,或使用 npm 全局安装;包含完整测试套件和示例程序
* 文档包括实现规范、重新格式化为 Markdown 的 1985 年规范原文,以及开发者入门说明
* MIT 许可证项目,作者 Alexander Demin,在线体验地址:<https://begoon.github.io/rapira>

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://github.com/begoon/rapira)**

### Taste-Skill - Anti-Slop Frontend Framework for AI Agents

* **What it does**: Provides portable "Agent Skills" that teach AI coding assistants (ChatGPT, Cursor, Claude) to generate high-quality, tasteful UI code instead of generic, boring interfaces. Includes both code-generation skills and image-generation skills for design references.

* **Key features**: 
  - Multiple specialized skills for different use cases (default taste-skill, GPT-optimized, redesign existing projects, minimalist/brutalist styles)
  - Configurable design dials (variance, motion intensity, visual density) to control output style
  - Image-generation skills for creating website comps, mobile mockups, and brand kits
  - Easy installation via `npx skills add` command
  - Works with major AI coding tools (Codex, Cursor, Claude Code)
  - Recently released v2 with substantial improvements including design-system mapping, GSAP animation skeletons, and stricter quality controls

* **Why it's notable**: Addresses a major pain point in AI-generated UIs—the tendency to produce bland, template-like designs ("slop"). With 2,715 stars today, it's gaining rapid traction among developers frustrated with generic AI outputs. The framework's modular approach lets developers pick specific skills for their needs, from polished premium interfaces to industrial brutalist designs, making AI-generated frontends actually look professional.

### Twenty - The #1 Open-Source CRM, Designed for AI

* **What it does**: Twenty is an open-source alternative to Salesforce that provides technical teams with building blocks to create custom CRMs. It allows you to define objects, fields, views, and workflows as code, then deploy them to your workspace. The platform includes AI agents, customizable layouts, and all standard CRM features.

* **Key features**: 
  - **Code-first approach**: Define CRM objects and fields using TypeScript, version control your CRM like any other codebase
  - **App development framework**: Build and publish custom apps with the Twenty CLI (`create-twenty-app`)
  - **AI-native**: Built-in AI agents and chat capabilities designed for modern workflows
  - **Flexible deployment**: Cloud-hosted option or self-host with Docker Compose
  - **Modern tech stack**: TypeScript, React, NestJS, PostgreSQL, with Nx monorepo architecture

* **Why it's notable**: With 519 stars today, Twenty is gaining traction as a developer-friendly CRM that treats business logic as code rather than point-and-click configuration. It bridges the gap between off-the-shelf CRMs (too rigid) and building from scratch (too expensive), offering the customization of a custom-built solution with the speed of a platform. The code-first approach appeals to technical teams who want their CRM to evolve alongside their product stack.

---

### Beyond Benchmarks: Frontier LLM Disagreement on Fact-Checks

**Research Summary**

* **67% disagreement rate**: Among 1,000 real-world fact-check claims, five frontier LLMs failed to reach consensus on 672 claims (95% CI: 64–70%)
* **Substantive conflicts**: 34% of claims (343/1,000) showed 2+ bucket gaps between model verdicts, indicating fundamental disagreement beyond calibration differences
* **Limited inter-rater reliability**: Krippendorff's α (ordinal) = 0.639 across 5 models, showing structured but inconsistent agreement
* **Polarized consensus pattern**: Models converge strongly on definitive True/False verdicts (43–47% unanimity) but fracture on nuanced middle categories (Mostly True: 5%, Misleading: 0% unanimity)
* **Model-specific behaviors**: Some models concentrate verdicts at True/False poles while others distribute across middle buckets; peer-majority agreement ranges 69–81%
* **Methodology**: Real user claims from Lenz fact-checking platform (post-Feb 15, 2026), normalized to neutral testable propositions, rated by 5 frontier LLMs using 4-bucket rubric
* **Error lower bound**: Assuming majority verdict is correct, ≥1 model wrong on 67% of claims, ≥2 wrong on 45%, ≥3 wrong on 13%
* **Highest model pair agreement**: Gemini 3 Pro × Gemini 3 Pro + Search (75%); Lowest: Claude Opus 4.7 × Gemini models and Gemini 3 Pro × Sonar Pro (53%)

---

### 超越基准测试：前沿大语言模型在事实核查中的分歧

**研究摘要**

* **67% 分歧率**：在 1,000 个真实世界事实核查声明中，五个前沿大语言模型在 672 个声明上未能达成共识（95% 置信区间：64–70%）
* **实质性冲突**：34% 的声明（343/1,000）在模型判定之间显示 2 个以上类别差距，表明超越校准差异的根本性分歧
* **有限的评分者间信度**：5 个模型在 1,000 个项目上的 Krippendorff's α（序数）= 0.639，显示结构化但不一致的一致性
* **两极化共识模式**：模型在明确的真/假判定上强烈收敛（43–47% 一致性），但在细微的中间类别上分裂（基本属实：5%，误导性：0% 一致性）
* **模型特定行为**：部分模型将判定集中在真/假两极，而其他模型分布在中间类别；同行多数一致性范围为 69–81%
* **方法论**：来自 Lenz 事实核查平台的真实用户声明（2026 年 2 月 15 日后），标准化为中性可测试命题，由 5 个前沿大语言模型使用 4 类别评分标准评定
* **错误下限**：假设多数判定正确，67% 的声明至少 1 个模型错误，45% 至少 2 个错误，13% 至少 3 个错误
* **最高模型对一致性**：Gemini 3 Pro × Gemini 3 Pro + Search（75%）；最低：Claude Opus 4.7 × Gemini 模型和 Gemini 3 Pro × Sonar Pro（53%）

### Indoor Wi-Fi Roaming with OpenWRT: Optimizing Multi-AP Performance

* **Problem**: After upgrading to OpenWRT on Cudy AX3000 units, Apple devices (iPhones, iPads, MacBooks) were not switching between access points efficiently, causing connectivity issues in certain areas of the house
* **Network Architecture**: Maintained separate 2.4GHz (WPA2 for legacy IoT devices) and 5GHz (WPA3/SAE for modern clients) networks across four APs with 2.5GbE backhaul, avoiding single-SSID approach due to legacy device requirements
* **Initial State**: Had 802.11r/k/v enabled and Fast Transition working, but lacked steering daemon and 802.11k neighbor reports were empty despite being enabled
* **Solution Implemented**: Installed `usteer` steering daemon and `static-neighbor-reports` package on all APs to enable proper client steering and populate 802.11k neighbor lists per band
* **Configuration Details**: Used band-specific neighbor reports (2.4GHz APs only advertise 2.4GHz peers, 5GHz only advertise 5GHz peers) to maintain network separation while enabling roaming within each band
* **Results**: Eliminated very weak client associations (previously at -90dBm), reduced sticky-client issues, and improved 5GHz client distribution across APs, though 2.4GHz remained congested due to environmental factors
* **Philosophy**: Zero cloud management, vendor-agnostic approach using OpenWRT, collectd/Graphite monitoring, and SSH-based configuration for full transparency and control

### OpenWRT 室内 Wi-Fi 漫游优化：多接入点性能调优

* **问题描述**：升级到 OpenWRT（Cudy AX3000 设备）后，苹果设备（iPhone、iPad、MacBook）无法有效地在接入点之间切换，导致房屋某些区域出现连接问题
* **网络架构**：维持独立的 2.4GHz（WPA2 用于传统物联网设备）和 5GHz（WPA3/SAE 用于现代客户端）网络，四个 AP 通过 2.5GbE 回程连接，因传统设备需求而避免使用单一 SSID 方案
* **初始状态**：已启用 802.11r/k/v 和快速切换功能，但缺少引导守护进程，且 802.11k 邻居报告列表为空
* **实施方案**：在所有 AP 上安装 `usteer` 引导守护进程和 `static-neighbor-reports` 软件包，实现客户端引导并按频段填充 802.11k 邻居列表
* **配置细节**：使用频段特定的邻居报告（2.4GHz AP 仅通告 2.4GHz 对等点，5GHz 仅通告 5GHz 对等点），在保持网络分离的同时实现频段内漫游
* **优化效果**：消除了极弱客户端关联（之前为 -90dBm），减少了粘性客户端问题，改善了 5GHz 客户端在各 AP 间的分布，但 2.4GHz 因环境因素仍然拥挤
* **技术理念**：零云管理、供应商无关的方案，使用 OpenWRT、collectd/Graphite 监控和基于 SSH 的配置，实现完全透明和可控

### EU Fines Temu €200M for Illegal Product Sales

* **Mystery shopping investigation** revealed major safety failures: high percentage of chargers failed basic electrical safety tests
* **Baby toy hazards identified**: toys contained chemicals above legal limits and small detachable parts posing suffocation risks
* **Compliance deadline**: Temu must submit action plan by August 28, 2024; EU Commission has 2 months to evaluate
* **EU's strong stance**: Tech Commissioner Henna Virkkunen emphasized this sends a "very strong message" to online marketplaces
* **Temu's response**: Company disputes the fine as "disproportionate," claims decision reflects 2024 systems not current state, considering all options
* **UK consumer group reaction**: Which? praised the EU action and urged UK government to use new Product Regulation and Metrology Act powers
* **Historic significance**: Second fine under EU's Digital Services Act (first was €120M against X/Twitter in December)

### 欧盟因非法产品销售对 Temu 罚款 2 亿欧元

* **神秘购物调查**揭露重大安全问题：高比例充电器未通过基本电气安全测试
* **婴儿玩具存在危险**：玩具化学物质含量超标，含有可拆卸小部件构成窒息风险
* **合规期限**：Temu 必须在 2024 年 8 月 28 日前提交整改计划；欧盟委员会有 2 个月评估时间
* **欧盟强硬立场**：科技专员 Henna Virkkunen 强调此举向在线市场传递"非常强烈的信息"
* **Temu 回应**：公司质疑罚款"不成比例"，声称决定反映的是 2024 年系统而非当前状态，正在考虑所有选项
* **英国消费者组织反应**：Which? 赞扬欧盟行动，敦促英国政府使用新《产品监管和计量法》权力
* **历史意义**：这是欧盟《数字服务法》实施的第二笔罚款（第一笔是去年 12 月对 X/推特罚款 1.2 亿欧元）

### Guizang Social Card Skill - AI-powered Xiaohongshu & WeChat cover generator with editorial design systems

* **What it does**: A Claude Code/Codex skill that generates professional social media graphics from text, screenshots, or photos. Produces Xiaohongshu (Rednote) carousel posts (3:4) and WeChat article cover pairs (21:9 + 1:1) using single-file HTML rendered to PNG.

* **Key features**: 
  - Dual visual systems: Editorial (magazine-style for narratives) and Swiss (grid-based for data/tutorials)
  - 28 layout templates (16 Editorial + 12 Swiss) with 10 curated color themes
  - Automated image sourcing from Unsplash/Pexels/Flickr/Wallhaven with attribution tracking
  - Built-in validation script checks overflow, typography limits, and layout density
  - WebGL ink-flow backgrounds, screenshot beautification assets, and MapLibre integration
  - Agent-friendly: HTML/CSS text format allows AI to write, read, and iterate directly

* **Why it's notable**: Solves the "AI can't do precise visual design" problem by encoding editorial design principles into structured templates. Unlike generic image generators, it enforces typographic hierarchy, grid systems, and platform-specific constraints (Xiaohongshu 3:4, WeChat 21:9/1:1). The single-file HTML approach makes it uniquely suited for AI agents—no build tools, just text manipulation and Playwright rendering. With 678 stars, it's becoming a reference implementation for agent-driven design automation in Chinese social media workflows.

---
